title: convolvulus montevidensis var. ottonis
intro: Convolvulus montevidensis var. ottonis, also known as the Argentine Morning Glory or Convolvulus Ottonis, is a flowering plant species in the Convolvulaceae family. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Convolvulus montevidensis var. ottonis include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Convolvulus montevidensis var. ottonis is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can be used fresh or dried for herbal remedies.
